source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH NumberedDays AS (
    SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 2, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 3, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 4, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 5, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 6, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 7, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 8, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 9, CalendarDay) FROM (SELECT CAST('2024-11-01' AS DATE) AS CalendarDay) AS StartDay
),
BusinessDays AS (
    -- Filter only business days (Monday to Friday) and exclude public holidays
    SELECT CalendarDay
    FROM NumberedDays
    WHERE DATEPART(WEEKDAY, CalendarDay) NOT IN (1, 7) -- Exclude weekends
    AND CalendarDay NOT IN (SELECT date FROM holidays) -- Exclude public holidays
)
-- Select the second business day
SELECT MIN(CalendarDay) AS SecondBusinessDay
FROM (
    SELECT CalendarDay, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CalendarDay) AS RowNum
    FROM BusinessDays
) AS RankedDays
WHERE RowNum = 2;
